command.note: Runs Ontoly through its built package APIs with write:false so source repositories are not modified.
Structural fallback: full Graphify extraction required an LLM backend for docs/images, so this run analyzes a validation-side code projection only. Source repositories remain untouched.
Uses graphify extract with --out to avoid writing into the source repository. --no-cluster keeps the run headless and deterministic for release validation.

strengths.evidence: Ontoly produced 29 Packages; Graphify produced 0 in the normalized model.

weaknesses.evidence: Graphify required an LLM backend for docs/images, so the comparison uses a structural code-only fallback graph.
Graphify produced 86 Classes; Ontoly produced 0 in the normalized model.
Graphify produced 1 Interfaces; Ontoly produced 0 in the normalized model.
Graphify produced 27 Environment Variables; Ontoly produced 0 in the normalized model.
Graphify produced 55 EXTENDS relationships; Ontoly produced 0.
Repository evidence suggests Turborepo, but Ontoly did not explicitly detect it.

recommendations.description: 3 graph validation issue(s) with code SELF_RELATIONSHIP.
recommendations.suggestedFix: Add a deterministic fixture for this validation issue and repair the graph construction invariant.

recommendations.description: Ontoly did not emit EXTENDS, while Graphify emitted 55.
recommendations.suggestedFix: Add or extend relationship extraction for EXTENDS and cover it with deterministic snapshots.

recommendations.description: Turborepo was inferred from repository metadata but not detected by Ontoly.
recommendations.suggestedFix: Add a Turborepo framework detector or map existing package evidence to a Framework node.

recommendations.description: Graphify full semantic extraction was unavailable without an LLM backend.
recommendations.suggestedFix: For release validation, configure a deterministic Graphify semantic backend or keep the structural fallback as a separate benchmark lane.
